fieldValues.value: RFC-009 Change B: Demote containerType to a derived/validated hint

On Container: containerType SHOULD equal the resolved root Type name (bare name, not namespace/name) when rootInstanceIds is present. Mismatch is diagnostic-only (I-64), not a validity error. On DocumentView: containerType MUST NOT be used for matching when rootTypeRefs is present. Retained as fallback for pre-RFC-009 tools (DV-Rx1).
containerType is optional; making mismatch a validity error would penalise authors of existing repos. A SHOULD diagnostic flags stale hints without breaking data.
